title: EndpointType uses as_uri()/from_uri() naming instead of as_str()
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/types.rs lines 159-200 — EndpointType uses as_uri() and from_uri() as its canonical accessor names, while every other string enum in the file (ChatMemberRole, ChatKind, BodyType, OwnerPresence, PushUrgency) uses as_str(). The divergence breaks structural uniformity and makes a future impl_string_enum\! macro harder to write without a special-case for EndpointType. The values are URIs semantically, but as_str() is the file-wide convention for 'give me the wire string'. Consider renaming to as_str()/from_str() (with a doc comment noting the values are URIs) or at minimum documenting the naming divergence explicitly.
